query:
INSERT INTO exchangeRates (date, currencyPair, rate, createdAt)
SELECT '2025-11-14', currencyPair, rate, NOW()
FROM exchangeRates
WHERE date = '2025-11-13'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rate = VALUES(rate);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute INSERT INTO exchangeRates (date, currencyPair, rate, createdAt)
SELECT '2025-11-14', currencyPair, rate, NOW()
FROM exchangeRates
WHERE date = '2025-11-13'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rate = VALUES(rate);
